channel.title: PaperMod on 생각 쓰레기통
channel.description: Recent content in PaperMod on 생각 쓰레기통

item.title: hugo PaperMod 테마에 Utterances로 댓글 붙이기
item.description: 결론 layouts/partials/comments.html을 아래 내용으로 추가. utterances script의 repo 부분은 저장소에 맞게 수정 필요. <script> document.write('<script src="https://utteranc.es/client.js" repo="ryugibo/blog" issue-term="pathname" label="💬" '); if (document.body.className.includes("dark")) { document.write('theme="github-dark-orange"'); } else { document.write('theme="github-light"'); } document.write(' crossorigin="anonymous" async><\/script>'); </script> {{- if (not .Site.Params.disableThemeToggle) }} <script> document.getElementById("theme-toggle").addEventListener("click", () => { if (document.body.className.includes("dark")) { const utterances = document.querySelector('iframe').contentWindow; utterances.postMessage({type: 'set-theme', theme: 'github-light'}, 'https://utteranc.es'); } else { const utterances = document.querySelector('iframe').contentWindow; utterances.postMessage({type: 'set-theme', theme: 'github-dark-orange'}, 'https://utteranc.es'); } }) </script> {{- end }} 내용 PaperMod 테마는 layouts/partials/comments.
